name: Apply Sprinting if not masked. The mask is used in the additive landing animations to improve the sprinting land. If not masked, the knees had the tendency to overcompress and cause IK issues.

name:
IMPORTANT!!!

The layout of every Animation Graph should ideally be determined by the specific needs of each individual project. Therefore, it is most likely necessary to modify parts (or all) of this Animation Graph and the Linked Layer Graphs in order to meet your project's specific needs. Thankfully, due to the highly flexible nature of UE4's animation system, it is entirely possible to keep/rearrange parts of these graphs (or concepts of this system) while also using a completely different setup.
title:
IMPORTANT!!!

The layout of every Animation Graph should ideally be determined by the specific needs of each individual project. Therefore, it is most likely necessary to modify parts (or all) of this Animation Graph and the Linked Layer Graphs in order to meet your project's specific needs. Thankfully, due to the highly flexible nature of UE4's animation system, it is entirely possible to keep/rearrange parts of these graphs (or concepts of this system) while also using a completely different setup.

name: Additive transition animations are injected here.
title: Additive transition animations are injected here.
terms: Additive transition animations are injected here.

name: This slot should be used for full body movement actions like dodges, climbs, rolls, etc.
title: This slot should be used for full body movement actions like dodges, climbs, rolls, etc.
terms: This slot should be used for full body movement actions like dodges, climbs, rolls, etc.

name: Each stance can have its own set of State Machines. The cached locomotion states are inserted into the "Main Grounded States" for easy transitions between stances.
title: Each stance can have its own set of State Machines. The cached locomotion states are inserted into the "Main Grounded States" for easy transitions between stances.

name: Calculate the Crouching Play Rate by dividing the Character's speed by the Animated Speed. This value needs to be separate from the standing play rate to improve the blend from crocuh to stand while in motion.
title: Calculate the Crouching Play Rate by dividing the Character's speed by the Animated Speed. This value needs to be separate from the standing play rate to improve the blend from crocuh to stand while in motion.

Get Float Value

Get Float Value
La destinazione è Curve Float
terms:
Get Float Value
La destinazione è Curve Float

name: Calculate the Diagnal Scale Amount. This value is used to scale the Foot IK Root bone to make the Foot IK bones cover more distance on the diagonal blends. Without scaling, the feet would not move far enough on the diagonal direction due to the linear translational blending of the IK bones. The curve is used to easily map the value.
title: Calculate the Diagnal Scale Amount. This value is used to scale the Foot IK Root bone to make the Foot IK bones cover more distance on the diagonal blends. Without scaling, the feet would not move far enough on the diagonal direction due to the linear translational blending of the IK bones. The curve is used to easily map the value.

name: Use the relative Velocity direction and amount to determine how much the character should lean while in air. The Lean In Air curve gets the Fall Speed and is used as a multiplier to smoothly reverse the leaning direction when transitioning from moving upwards to moving downwards.
title: Use the relative Velocity direction and amount to determine how much the character should lean while in air. The Lean In Air curve gets the Fall Speed and is used as a multiplier to smoothly reverse the leaning direction when transitioning from moving upwards to moving downwards.
